states.offline: You are offline. Changes are saved locally.

landing.badge: Built for African construction & field service teams
landing.heroTitle: Run every job site from your phone
landing.heroSubtitle: Projects, attendance, daily reports, materials and expenses — one bilingual platform for construction and service companies that run today on WhatsApp, paper and Excel.
landing.heroNote: No credit card required · Set up your company in minutes
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your field teams need, in one place
landing.featuresSubtitle: Replace scattered WhatsApp threads, paper notebooks and Excel sheets with one system your whole company can see.

dailyReports.title: Daily site reports
dailyReports.desc: Supervisors log work completed, materials used and issues in under three minutes — from any phone.

attendance.title: Attendance & labor
attendance.desc: Fast per-worker check-in with GPS and audited corrections, so labor costs are always accurate.

projects.title: Projects & budgets
projects.desc: Track every job site's status, budget, milestones and completion percentage in real time.

materials.title: Materials & inventory
materials.desc: Low-stock alerts and a full request-to-approval workflow keep job sites supplied.

expenses.title: Expenses & approvals
expenses.desc: Field expenses route to the right approver automatically, with configurable auto-approval thresholds.

equipment.title: Equipment tracking
equipment.desc: Know where every asset is, who has it, and when it's due for maintenance.

portal.title: Client portal
portal.desc: Give clients a clean view of progress, milestones and invoices — without exposing internal costs or margins.

team.title: Roles & permissions
team.desc: Owners, project managers, supervisors, accountants and field workers each see exactly what they need.

landing.howItWorksTitle: From sign-up to your first site report in minutes
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: No implementation project, no training course — just a simple setup your team can start using today.

one.title: Create your company
one.desc: Set your country, currency and language. English and French are both first-class from day one.

two.title: Add projects & invite your team
two.desc: Create your first job site, invite supervisors and workers, and assign roles in minutes.

three.title: Run daily operations
three.desc: Attendance, daily reports, materials and expenses — captured from the field, on any phone.

four.title: See it all from the dashboard
four.desc: Management gets live visibility into every site, every cost, every approval — no more chasing updates.

landing.marketsTitle: Built for Francophone and Anglophone Africa
landing.marketsSubtitle: Local currencies, time zones and business French built in — not bolted on. Currently configured for these markets, with more added over time.

faq.a1: Yes. English and French are both fully supported from the first screen — navigation, forms, notifications and reports — and each teammate can choose their own language independently of the company default.
faq.a2: The platform ships with currency and timezone defaults for major Francophone and Anglophone African markets, and supports any organization's own currency and country setting.
faq.q3: Does it work on a slow connection?
faq.a3: Yes. The app is built mobile-first as an installable Progressive Web App, with lightweight pages and draft-saving on the highest-priority field forms so a dropped connection doesn't lose your work.
faq.q4: Is my company's data isolated from other companies?
faq.a4: Yes. Every organization's data is isolated at the server level — access is verified on every request and never trusted from the browser, so one company can never see another's records.
faq.q5: Can I control what my clients see?
faq.a5: Yes. Clients only ever see a dedicated portal showing shared project progress, milestones and invoices — never internal costs, worker pay rates or margins.

landing.ctaTitle: Bring your job sites onto one platform
landing.ctaSubtitle: Set up your company and invite your team — free to get started.
